metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Felipe Philipp

plugins.name: claude-notifier
plugins.description: Multi-channel notification dispatcher for Claude Code hooks. Proxies notifications to ntfy and other channels.

plugins.name: github-tools
plugins.description: GitHub CLI tools for CI monitoring, PR management, and workflow automation.

plugins.name: writing-style
plugins.description: Personal writing style guide for blog posts, PR descriptions, and general prose. Enforces voice, structure, and anti-patterns.
